Custom White Circle Waterproof Roll Labels

Professional Circle Roll Labels for Food, Beverage & Product Packaging

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Options Quantity Selection Design Method Selection Template Design Upload Print-Ready File Get Design Assistance Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Circle Waterproof Roll Labels for Commercial Use

Looking for labels that combine durability, elegance, and practicality? Our custom white circle waterproof roll labels are your perfect solution for professional packaging applications. Made from high-quality biaxially oriented polypropylene (BOPP), these labels deliver exceptional waterproof protection while maintaining professional appearance across food, beverage, and consumer product packaging. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

These white circle waterproof roll labels resist moisture, chemicals, and oils, ensuring your branding remains sharp and your products look their best in any environment. The circular format provides optimal branding space while the roll configuration ensures efficient application in commercial packaging operations.

Key Features of White Circle Waterproof Roll Labels

Our white circle waterproof roll labels feature premium BOPP material construction that delivers superior adhesion and long-lasting durability. The waterproof coating protects against condensation, spills, and environmental moisture, making them ideal for refrigerated products, beverages, and outdoor applications.

Available Sizes and Customization Options

Choose from multiple circle sizes ranging from 1" to 4" diameter to match your packaging requirements. Each white circle waterproof roll label can be fully customized with your logo, branding, product information, and color schemes to create professional packaging that stands out on shelves.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order White Circle Waterproof Roll Labels

Ordering your custom white circle waterproof roll labels is straightforward with our streamlined process designed for both small businesses and large commercial operations. Our system guides you through each step to ensure your labels meet exact specifications.

Design Process

Start by selecting your preferred design method for your white circle waterproof roll labels. Use our online designer to create from scratch by uploading your logo or choosing from our clipart library, or upload your own print-ready file in EPS format for highest quality results. Our design tools accommodate both simple text layouts and complex branding elements.

File Upload and Proofing

Once you've completed your white circle waterproof roll label design and added the product to your cart, select your shipping method to receive an emailed proof. This proof allows you to review your labels exactly as they will print, ensuring perfect results before production begins.

Payment Requirements

All white circle waterproof roll label orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards for immediate processing. Check payments are also accepted but must be received before your labels enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your white circle waterproof roll label order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system enables you to monitor your labels through every stage of our production process, from order placement through delivery, providing complete visibility into your order status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Circle Waterproof Roll Label Production & Turnaround Times

Understanding production timelines helps you plan your packaging operations effectively. Our white circle waterproof roll labels follow a standard production schedule that ensures quality while meeting your deadline requirements.

Standard Production Timeline

Standard production time for white circle waterproof roll labels is 8 business days from file approval. This timeline allows our production team to maintain quality standards while efficiently processing your custom labels. Production begins once your proof is approved and payment is processed.

Order Processing Schedule

Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST are processed the following business day to ensure proper attention to detail. The production timeline for your white circle waterproof roll labels starts when file upload is complete and all specifications are confirmed. If an order requires prepress adjustments or awaits proof approval, turnaround begins from the approval time.

Rush Production Options

Emergency and same-day rush options are available for white circle waterproof roll labels in certain circumstances. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 to discuss rush production availability and requirements. Rush orders may have limitations on quantity and customization options.

Production vs. Shipping Time

The total time to receive your white circle waterproof roll labels includes both production time and shipping time. Production time covers manufacturing your labels, while shipping time represents delivery duration. Plan accordingly by adding both timeframes to your expected delivery date.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Circle Waterproof Roll Label Cut Options

Understanding cut options helps you choose the right application method for your white circle waterproof roll labels. Each cut style offers specific advantages depending on your packaging needs and application environment.

Die Cut White Circle Waterproof Roll Labels

Die cut processing creates individual white circle waterproof roll labels that are completely cut through both the label material and backing paper. This option provides the cleanest removal from the roll and easiest application for high-volume packaging operations. The backing paper comes away cleanly, leaving only your circular label.

Kiss Cut White Circle Waterproof Roll Labels

Kiss cut white circle waterproof roll labels are cut through the label material only, leaving the backing paper intact. This creates a continuous backing that makes label removal and application efficient for automated dispensing systems. The backing paper provides consistent tracking through label applicators.

Selecting the Right Cut Option

Choose die cut for manual application where complete backing removal is preferred, or select kiss cut for automated application systems. Both cut options maintain the waterproof integrity of your white circle waterproof roll labels while providing different application advantages based on your packaging workflow.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Circle Waterproof Roll Label Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your white circle waterproof roll labels print with optimal quality and accurate colors. Following these specifications helps achieve professional results that represent your brand effectively.

Preferred File Types

For best results with white circle waterproof roll labels, submit Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) or PDF (Adobe PDF) files with maximum file size of 100 MB. When submitting these files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure accurate printing and prevent font substitution issues.

Additional File Formats

We also accept JPG (High Resolution JPEG), TIFF (High Resolution TIFF), and PNG (High Resolution PNG) files for white circle waterproof roll labels. These raster formats work well for photographic elements but require proper resolution settings for quality output.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up artwork proportionate to your exact white circle waterproof roll label size and convert all text to outlines. Allow for bleed only when necessary and never flatten or merge layers in PSD files. Clearly indicate cut lines for proper die cutting of your circular labels.

Vector vs. Raster Artwork

Vector artwork consisting of mathematically defined lines and curves provides the best results for white circle waterproof roll labels, especially for text and logos. Raster images work well for photographic elements but require proper resolution: 100% scale at 100 dpi, 50% scale at 200+ dpi, or 25% scale at 300+ dpi.

Design Services

If you cannot provide suitable artwork for your white circle waterproof roll labels, our vectorizing service can recreate most logos for as little as $15. More detailed images may require custom quoting. This service requires advance payment and includes file storage for future orders.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Circle Waterproof Roll Label Shipping & Delivery

Understanding shipping options and timelines helps you plan when your white circle waterproof roll labels will arrive for your packaging operations. Our shipping network delivers to 90% of the United States within 2-4 business days after production completion.

Standard Shipping Methods

Your white circle waterproof roll labels ship via UPS Ground unless otherwise specified during ordering. You'll receive tracking information once your package ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress. For questions about shipping rates or expedited options, contact our customer service representatives at (320) 391-5250 before placing your order.

Shipping Speed Options

Choose from multiple shipping speeds for your white circle waterproof roll labels: Economy (5-15 days), Standard (3-5 business days), Three Day (3 business days), Two Day (2 business days), or Overnight (1 business day). Faster shipping options ensure your labels arrive when needed for time-sensitive packaging projects.

Economy Shipping Considerations

When selecting economy shipping for white circle waterproof roll labels, include additional postal information like P.O. Box numbers in the "Address Two" field during checkout. Economy shipping may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination, so plan accordingly for your packaging schedule.

International Shipping

We ship white circle waterproof roll labels internationally through USPS and UPS carriers. International shipments require shipping labels and customs documentation provided by customers. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 for international shipping assistance and requirements.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Circle Waterproof Roll Label Installation Guide

Proper application techniques ensure your white circle waterproof roll labels adhere correctly and maintain their waterproof properties throughout their service life. Following these steps maximizes adhesion and prevents application issues.

Surface Preparation

Clean the application surface thoroughly before applying white circle waterproof roll labels. Remove all dirt, grease, moisture, and residue using isopropyl alcohol or appropriate cleaners. Allow surfaces to dry completely, as moisture can compromise adhesion and waterproof performance of your labels.

Application Process

Remove white circle waterproof roll labels from backing paper carefully to avoid stretching or damaging the material. Position the label accurately before contact, as the strong adhesive makes repositioning difficult. Apply firm, even pressure from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles and ensure complete contact.

Temperature Considerations

Apply white circle waterproof roll labels in temperatures between 50-90°F for optimal adhesion. Cold surfaces may prevent proper bonding, while excessive heat can cause premature adhesive activation. Allow 24 hours for full adhesive cure before subjecting labels to moisture or stress.

Automated Application

For high-volume application of white circle waterproof roll labels, ensure your dispensing equipment is calibrated for the label dimensions and backing material. Kiss-cut labels typically work better with automated systems, while die-cut labels excel in manual application scenarios.

Quality Control Tips

Inspect each applied white circle waterproof roll label for proper adhesion and bubble-free application. Address any application issues immediately while the adhesive is still workable. Proper application ensures your labels maintain their waterproof integrity and professional appearance throughout their service life.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are White Circle Waterproof Roll Labels?

White circle waterproof roll labels are specialized adhesive labels made from biaxially oriented polypropylene (BOPP) material that provides superior moisture resistance and durability. These circular-shaped labels come on continuous rolls for efficient dispensing and application in commercial packaging operations. They are commonly used for food packaging, beverage containers, product identification, and outdoor applications where moisture resistance is essential. The labels feature permanent adhesive backing and can be applied manually or through automated label dispensing systems.

Design Your Custom White Circle Waterproof Roll Labels Today

Ready to enhance your product packaging with professional white circle waterproof roll labels? Our custom labels combine durability, moisture resistance, and attractive circular design to make your products stand out while protecting your branding investment. With multiple size options and complete customization capabilities, you can create labels that perfectly match your packaging requirements.

Start designing your white circle waterproof roll labels using our online design tools or upload your existing artwork for production. Our quality BOPP material construction ensures your labels maintain their appearance and adhesion even in challenging environments. Whether you need labels for food packaging, beverage containers, or general product identification, our waterproof circular labels deliver reliable performance.

Questions about specifications or need assistance with your design? Contact our experienced customer service team who can help you select the right options for your application. We also offer additional waterproof label shapes if you need different configurations for your packaging line.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Circle Waterproof Roll Label FAQs

How long do white circle waterproof roll labels last outdoors?

White circle waterproof roll labels typically last 3-5 years outdoors when applied to clean, smooth surfaces like glass or metal. The BOPP material construction provides excellent UV resistance and weatherability, maintaining adhesion and print quality even in challenging environmental conditions. Indoor applications can extend label life significantly beyond outdoor exposure timeframes.

What surfaces work best with white circle waterproof roll labels?

These labels adhere best to smooth, non-porous surfaces such as glass, metal, plastic containers, and coated packaging materials. Clean surfaces free from oils, dust, and moisture ensure optimal adhesion. Textured or porous surfaces may reduce adhesive performance and waterproof effectiveness of the labels.

Can I get different finishes for white circle waterproof roll labels?

Yes, white circle waterproof roll labels are available in both matte and gloss white finishes to match your packaging aesthetic. The gloss finish provides vibrant color reproduction and enhanced durability, while matte offers a subdued, professional appearance with reduced glare under lighting.

What file format works best for white circle waterproof roll label artwork?

Adobe Illustrator EPS or PDF files produce the highest quality results for white circle waterproof roll labels. These vector formats maintain crisp edges and accurate colors at any size. Convert all fonts to outlines before submitting to prevent font substitution issues during production.

Are white circle waterproof roll labels food safe?

Our white circle waterproof roll labels use food-safe materials and adhesives that comply with FDA regulations for direct and indirect food contact applications. The BOPP material construction resists moisture and contaminants while maintaining safety standards for food packaging environments.

How do I calculate the right quantity of white circle waterproof roll labels for my needs?

Consider your monthly packaging volume and order frequency to determine optimal quantities. Ordering larger quantities typically reduces per-unit costs while smaller orders provide flexibility for design changes. Factor in storage capacity and shelf life when calculating your white circle waterproof roll label requirements.

Can white circle waterproof roll labels be removed after application?

These labels use permanent adhesive designed for long-term applications and are not intended for easy removal. Attempting to remove white circle waterproof roll labels may damage the underlying surface or leave adhesive residue. Consider removable adhesive options if temporary application is needed.
